name: Communication Satellites
tagline: Microwave repeaters in orbit — global footprints, transponders, and the geometry of delay
problem:
Submarine cables are expensive; HF skywave is moody; microwave towers need line-of-sight chains across politics. Satellites offer a microwave repeater hundreds or thousands of kilometres up, seeing enormous ground footprints — one hop where Earth would need dozens of towers.

Orbits trade gifts: geostationary dishes stay pointed but inject quarter-second echo on voice; low Earth constellations cut latency but demand handoffs and thousands of spacecraft. Launch is still violence wrapped in paperwork — mass and reliability dominate.

Space is not empty for electronics: radiation ionises gates; single-event upsets flip bits; atomic oxygen gnaws surfaces in LEO. Thermal design must survive sunside and shadowside every hour without cracking solder.

Regulation treats spectrum and slots as property-like — ITU filings are diplomacy with Kepler attached.
overview:
A satellite bus supplies power from solar arrays and batteries, controls temperature with heat pipes and radiators, maintains attitude with reaction wheels and thrusters, and talks to Earth via telemetry links. Payloads amplify and translate microwave bands — LNAs at the antenna, channel filters, TWTA or solid-state power amplifiers, output multiplexers.

Ground stations track with parabolic dishes, cryogenic LNAs for weak signals, and modems that close link budgets against rain fade. Beam shaping and polarisation reuse squeeze capacity; digital carriers pack many signals per transponder with error correction.

End-of-life graveyard burns and deorbit plans address debris ethics; collision avoidance manoeuvres are now routine operations, not science fiction.

Navigation constellations are cousins — same buses, different maths — proving communication and timing are braided.

principles.name: Link budget
principles.explanation: C/N0 integrates EIRP, path loss, G/T, and losses — closes whether a modem can lock.

principles.name: Shannon limit on transponder
principles.explanation: Operating back-off from saturation trades linearity for capacity — multicarrier needs linear amps.

principles.name: Doppler in LEO
principles.explanation: Fast satellites shift carrier — receivers track with PLL bandwidth.

principles.name: Radiation hardness
principles.explanation: Shielding, RHBD logic, and EDAC mitigate SEUs — watchdogs reboot gracefully.

rawMaterials.name: GaAs and GaN MMICs
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Triple-junction gallium arsenide solar cells from multi-junction fabs; silicon panels for cheaper missions with lower areal power

rawMaterials.name: Xenon or hydrazine
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Aluminium honeycomb panels and carbon-fibre composites for bus structures where mass dominates launch cost

rawMaterials.name: Solar cells
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Monopropellant hydrazine or electric propulsion xenon — propellant choice sets station-keeping life and logistics

buildSteps.title: Close a link budget on paper before CAD
buildSteps.description: List transmitter EIRP, path loss, atmospheric fade margin, receive G/T, and required Eb/N0. If margin is negative, no heroics in assembly fix orbit physics.
buildSteps.warningNote: Forgetting pointing loss leaves you one beamwidth from silence

buildSteps.title: Qualify parts for radiation and thermal cycling
buildSteps.description: Test electronics under dose and temperature swings; add shielding mass only where failure rates demand it. Redundant lanes with cross-straps beat heroic single strings.
buildSteps.warningNote: Latch-up in CMOS can brick a bus — design inhibits

buildSteps.title: Integrate payload and bus with clean grounding
buildSteps.description: Separate noisy digital returns from analogue RF references; verify antenna pattern on a range before launch. Label every coax phase and polarization.
buildSteps.warningNote: PIM from corroded joints raises noise floor mysteriously

buildSteps.title: Rehearse operations on simulators with injected faults
buildSteps.description: Train operators for loss of attitude, battery collapse, and safe mode entry. Write command dictionaries two humans must agree on before uplinking.
buildSteps.warningNote: Fat-fingered commands cannot be ‘oops’ in orbit

buildSteps.title: Commission on orbit with patience
buildSteps.description: Unfold arrays slowly; bake out moisture; map momentum wheel saturation. Verify transponder linearity before loading many carriers — intermodulation is rude to neighbours.
buildSteps.warningNote: Thruster leaks re-point antennas — monitor pressure

history.event: Echo 1 passive reflector; Telstar active relay follows.
Intelsat I Early Bird commercial geostationary service.

impact:
Satellites made live global television and intercontinental telephony routine — and turned orbital slots into strategic assets.

Collapse without launch cadence still benefits from understanding link budgets for terrestrial relays.
